reviews.comment:
Todos los servicios pero muy lentos.
En finde largo con alto tránsito, los baños estaban desbordados. La atención en caja y playeros es lenta. Faltaría reforzar con personal. Los empleados muy atentos, a pesar de la presión de las colas.
Tiene lugar para casillas y motorhome muy buenos.

(Translated by Google)
All services, but very slow.
On a long weekend with heavy traffic, the restrooms were overflowing. Service at the checkout and beach is slow. It could use more staff. The employees were very attentive, despite the long lines.
It has very good space for cabins and motorhomes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoMi1lY09REAE

reviews.comment:
Con mucho placer califico este lugar y agradezco la posibilidad de hacerlo. Es para distinguir la atencion amable y servicial de sus empleados pero es un punto extra el restaurant, para viajeros en ruta, que puedan ofrecer unos sandwiches deliciosos, abundantes, rapidos y a punto , es un deleite y una tranquilidad. Lo super recomiendo. Y con descuento a los que somos socios del A.C.A. Despues de tantas malas experiencias , aqui encontramos nuevamente la esencia de pertenecer al A.C.A. Gracias.

(Translated by Google)
It is with great pleasure that I rate this place and I am grateful for the opportunity to do so. The friendly and helpful service of the staff is noteworthy, but the restaurant is a real highlight. For travelers on the road, they offer delicious, generous, quick, and perfectly cooked sandwiches—a true delight and a welcome relief. I highly recommend it. And there's a discount for those of us who are members of the A.C.A. After so many bad experiences, we've rediscovered the true meaning of belonging to the A.C.A. Thank you.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoay12YUpBEAE
